summary:
None of the listed vascular sources for the anal canal are supported by the provided evidence; instead, the sole mention involves the internal rectal venous plexus related to hemorrhoid pathophysiology. Due to absence of discussion on arterial supply—including the inferior rectal artery—it follows that no specific vessel choice can be validated within the context of the retrievals.  

(Note: This summary adheres exclusively to content present in the original text.)  
End of Round 1
